mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sub.cnt), 0) FROM ( SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message m WHERE m.room_id = c.room_id AND m.id > COALESCE(c.last_read_id, 0) AND m.from_uid != #{userId} AND m.status = 0 ) AS cnt FROM chat_contact c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.last_msg_id IS NOT NULL AND (c.last_read_id IS NULL OR c.last_msg_id > c.last_read_id) ) sub

SELECT c.id AS id, c.room_id AS room_id, c.top AS top, c.mute AS mute, c.active_time AS active_time, r.type AS type, CASE WHEN r.type = 2 THEN COALESCE(g.name, r.name, '群聊') ELSE COALESCE(u.name, '未知用户') END AS name, CASE WHEN r.type = 2 THEN g.avatar ELSE u.avatar END AS avatar, m.content AS last_content, m.type AS last_type, m.status AS last_status, m.create_time AS last_time, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message msg WHERE msg.room_id = c.room_id AND msg.is_visible = TRUE AND msg.from_uid != #{userId} AND (c.last_read_id IS NULL OR msg.id > c.last_read_id) ), 0) AS unread_count FROM chat_contact c INNER JOIN chat_room r ON r.id = c.room_id LEFT JOIN chat_group g ON r.type = 2 AND g.room_id = c.room_id AND g.deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.type = 1 AND u.id = CASE WHEN (r.ext_info ->> 'uid1')::bigint = #{userId} THEN (r.ext_info ->> 'uid2')::bigint ELSE (r.ext_info ->> 'uid1')::bigint END LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT content, type, status, create_time FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = c.room_id AND status != 2 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 ) m ON TRUE WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.top DESC, COALESCE(m.create_time, c.active_time) DESC
